title: Nasrabi (disambiguation)
content:
'''Nasrabi''' may refer to:

*'''[[Nasrabi]]''', a warrior [[Queen/Legends|queen]] of [[Dac/Legends|Mon Cala]]
*'''[[Amira Nasrabi]]''', owner of the [[Illuminated Aquean]] [[Casino/Legends|casino]] in the [[Vaynai Archipelago]]
*'''[[Mussat Nasrabi]]''', owner of [[The Floating Fish]] casino in [[Cloud City/Legends|Cloud City]]

{{Disambig}}
